case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $869 U.S. CURRENCY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA ISLAM, RASHID

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $869 U.S. CURRENCY ; 2011 LEXUS BTM CALIF. LICENSE PLATE NO 6PIC136, VIN: JTJBC1BA1B2034951 BANK OF AMERICA CASHIER'S CHECK NO: 000461863 IN THE AMOUNT OF $14296.69 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

AMENDED PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM (H&S 11469 ET SEQ.) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $869.00 U.S. CURRENCY; ; 2011 LEXUS BTM CALIF. LICENSE PLATE NO 6PIC136, VIN: JTJBC1BA1B2034951; ALL ASSETS IN BANK OF AMERICA  ACCOUNT NO. 0005-6227-4623 THOSE ASSETS BEING $14,296.69.U.S CURRENCY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $869.00 U.S. CURRENCY; ALL ASSETS IN BANK OF AMERICA ACCOUNT NO. 0005-6227-4623 THOSE ASSETS BEING $14, 296.69 U.S. CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
